tool.name: Keep success

param.name: replacement
param.label: Replace unsuccessful elements with this dataset
param.help: If provided, unsuccessful elements will be replaced with this dataset

tool.help:
======== Synopsis ========
Keeps only datasets in the success (green) state from a collection.
=========== Description ===========
This tool takes a dataset collection and retains only datasets in the success (green) state, removing any that are failed, paused, or in other non-success states. This is useful for continuing a multi-sample analysis when one or more of the samples fails or is in a paused state.
Optionally, you can provide a replacement dataset. When a replacement is specified, unsuccessful elements are replaced with that dataset instead of being removed.
.. image:: ${static_path}/images/tools/collection_ops/keep_success.svg :alt: Keep success datasets :width: 500
-----
.. class:: infomark
@QUOTA_USAGE_NOTE@
